Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Discovery Responses Against Deft David William Vanineau
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
DAvid W. Bavineau, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL QUIRK's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Defendant David William Bavineau is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant David William Bavineau is ordered to response to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Request for Production Of Documents, Requests For Admission, and Special Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.
